name: AWS Glue
description: Import AWS Glue jobs, crawlers, workflows, DataBrew recipes, and data quality rulesets as Dagster assets with automatic lineage from Data Catalog tables. Uses StateBackedComponent to cache AWS API results on disk, so code-server reloads require zero network calls.
author: Dagster Community

outputs.description: Generates assets for each discovered Glue entity

aws_access_key_id.label: AWS Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID (optional if using IAM role)

aws_secret_access_key.label: AWS Secret Access Key
aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key (optional if using IAM role)

aws_session_token.label: AWS Session Token
aws_session_token.description: AWS session token for temporary credentials (optional)

import_jobs.label: Import Glue Jobs
import_jobs.description: Discover and import Glue ETL jobs as materializable assets with lineage to Data Catalog tables

import_crawlers.label: Import Crawlers
import_crawlers.description: Discover and import Glue crawlers as materializable assets

import_workflows.label: Import Workflows
import_workflows.description: Discover and import Glue workflows as materializable assets

import_databrew_jobs.label: Import DataBrew Jobs
import_databrew_jobs.description: Discover and import Glue DataBrew recipe jobs as materializable assets

import_data_quality_rulesets.label: Import Data Quality Rulesets
import_data_quality_rulesets.description: Discover and import data quality rulesets as observable assets

import_catalog_tables.label: Import Data Catalog Tables
import_catalog_tables.description: Discover and import Glue Data Catalog tables as observable assets for lineage tracking

catalog_database_filter.label: Catalog Database Filter
catalog_database_filter.description: Comma-separated list of database names to import tables from (optional; defaults to all databases)

job_name_prefix.label: Job Name Prefix
job_name_prefix.description: Only include jobs (and other entities) whose names start with this prefix

exclude_jobs.label: Exclude Jobs
exclude_jobs.description: Explicit list of job names to exclude from discovery

filter_by_name_pattern.label: Filter by Name Pattern
filter_by_name_pattern.description: Regex pattern to include entities by name

exclude_name_pattern.label: Exclude Name Pattern
exclude_name_pattern.description: Regex pattern to exclude entities by name

filter_by_tags.label: Filter by Tags
filter_by_tags.description: Comma-separated tag keys to filter entities (entities must have at least one of these tags)

group_name.label: Asset Group
group_name.description: Group name for all imported assets

key_prefix.label: Asset Key Prefix
key_prefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to all asset keys

poll_interval_seconds.label: Job Poll Interval
poll_interval_seconds.description: How often (seconds) to poll Glue API while waiting for a job run to complete

generate_sensor.label: Generate Observation Sensor
generate_sensor.description: Create a sensor to observe externally-triggered Glue runs
